title: echinochloa crus-galli var. macrocarpa
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli var. macrocarpa, also known as the barnyard grass or barnyard millet, is a type of invasive grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli var. macrocarpa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
